data.title: Cornerstone Building Brands' products from Ply Gem, Simonton Windows & Doors, and Mastic by Ply Gem will be featured in season 7 of Fixer to Fabulous.
data.description: In Cary, North Carolina, products from Cornerstone Building Brands, including Ply Gem, Simonton Windows & Doors, and Mastic by Ply Gem, were showcased on the seventh season of Fixer to Fabulous.

data.title: SEI in Cincinnati announces leadership transitions to honor legacy while advancing future; Jan. 12, 2026.
data.description: SEI, a reputable management consulting firm known for providing innovative solutions, recently revealed leadership changes on January 12, 2026. The company, based in Cincinnati, is gearing up to transition to the next phase while paying tribute to its distinguished history. This move comes as SEI continues to uphold its commitment to delivering trustworthy outcomes.

data.title: Apple to use Google's Gemini AI models for Siri upgrades, stock unaffected.
data.description: On Monday, it was announced that Apple will be utilizing Google's Gemini AI models for improving the upcoming version of its Siri digital assistant. This move had a minimal impact on Apple stock. The collaboration highlights Apple's focus on enhancing AI capabilities. The decision to incorporate Google's technology showcases the need for advanced AI systems in today's digital landscape. This partnership signifies a strategic advancement in Apple's journey towards achieving superior AI integration with Siri.

data.title: Meta appoints Dina Powell McCormick as president and vice chair to lead AI buildout. Key move for tech giant.
data.description: Dina Powell McCormick has been appointed by Meta as the President and Vice Chair to spearhead the company's AI expansion initiatives. This key role marks an important step in Meta's efforts to bolster its AI capabilities.

data.title: Alnylam stock slid after 4th quarter preannouncement at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conf. Tempus and Day One stocks rose.
data.description: The stock of Alnylam dropped on Monday following its preannouncement for the fourth quarter before the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. The decline in Alnylam was attributed to the impact of post-JPM preannouncements. The stock of Alnylam slid as investors assessed the news regarding Tempus and Day One.

data.title: Mesirow advises Wertheimer Box on sale to SupplyOne, Inc., a Revelar Capital company. Rick Weil and Melanie Yermack lead transaction.
data.description: Rick Weil, holding the position of Managing Director and Co-Head of Packaging, along with Melanie Yermack, who serves as Managing Director and Co-Head of Packaging, were the key transaction leads. Mesirow took on the role of the exclusive financial advisor for this deal, showcasing the firm's noteworthy achievement in the packaging industry. This significant transaction underscores Mesirow's strong presence and success in the sector. The location of this news is Chicago.

data.title: Luxury medspa brand ALEXIS LAUREN, led by founder Alexis Renda, announces franchise expansion nationwide to redefine wellness.
data.description: A brand founded by women is aiming to broaden its presence across the country in the rapidly growing aesthetic wellness sector. ALEXIS LAUREN, an upscale medspa brand led by its founder, is revolutionizing tailored aesthetic procedures and skincare. The brand recently revealed its expansion plans in Miami on January 12, 2026.

data.title: Global Aftermarket Vehicle Telematics Hardware Market report provides insights and industry forecasts for 5 years.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "The Global Aftermarket Vehicle Telematics Hardware Market - 4th Edition" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report serves as a primary source of information regarding the aftermarket installation market for passenger car and commercial vehicle telematics hardware globally. It caters to various entities including telematics hardware vendors, vehicle telematics service providers, vehicle manufacturers, telecom operators, investors, etc. The report provides comprehensive insights and analysis on the aftermarket vehicle telematics hardware market, making it a valuable resource for industry players.

data.title: Touchmark Bancshares, Inc. declares $0.65 per share annual cash dividend, payout on January 26, 2026.
data.description: Touchmark Bancshares, Inc., the parent company of Touchmark National Bank, based in Alpharetta, Georgia, revealed on January 12, 2026, that its Board of Directors has authorized the distribution of an annual cash dividend of $0.65 per share. Shareholders are set to receive this dividend on January 26, 2026.

data.title: Chicken Salad Chick offers free scoop of Classic Carol on Guest Appreciation Day Jan 22, thanking guests nationwide.
data.description: A popular fast-casual chain is expressing gratitude to customers across the country by offering a free scoop of their popular Classic Carol dish on January 22nd. Chicken Salad Chick, known as the sole fast-casual restaurant specializing in chicken salad, is hosting its yearly Guest Appreciation Day event.

data.title: "Biohaven showcases progress with degrader programs at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference, reports positive early patient data."
data.description: Early clinical data from the first and only clinically validated extracellular protein degraders have shown positive results, utilizing Biohaven's proprietary MoDE™ technology and Yale University's licensed next-generation TRAP™ degraders. In the initial clinical trials involving patients, this novel approach has demonstrated promising outcomes.

data.title: Paramount escalates tensions to acquire Warner Bros. Discovery, sparking board fight in latest move.
data.description: Paramount's recent announcement marks another step in their ongoing pursuit to acquire Warner Bros, showcasing their growing determination in the industry.
